fields.name: HSIRDY
fields.description: Internal High Speed clock ready flag

fields.name: HSERDY
fields.description: External High Speed clock ready flag

enum_values.name: Bypassed
enum_values.description: HSE crystal oscillator bypassed with external clock

enum_values.name: Off
enum_values.description: Clock security system disabled (clock detector OFF)

enum_values.name: On
enum_values.description: Clock security system enable (clock detector ON if the HSE is ready, OFF if not)

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: HSI oscillator used as system clock

enum_values.name: HSE
enum_values.description: HSE oscillator used as system clock

enum_values.name: HSI_Div2
enum_values.description: HSI divided by 2 selected as PLL input clock

enum_values.name: HSI_Div_PREDIV
enum_values.description: HSI divided by PREDIV selected as PLL input clock

enum_values.name: HSE_Div_PREDIV
enum_values.description: HSE divided by PREDIV selected as PLL input clock

enum_values.name: NoMCO
enum_values.description: MCO output disabled, no clock on MCO

enum_values.name: LSI
enum_values.description: Internal low speed (LSI) oscillator clock selected

enum_values.name: LSE
enum_values.description: External low speed (LSE) oscillator clock selected

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: Internal RC 8 MHz (HSI) oscillator clock selected

enum_values.name: PLL
enum_values.description: PLL clock selected (divided by 1 or 2, depending en PLLNODIV)

enum_values.name: SYSCLK
enum_values.description: System clock used as I2S clock source

enum_values.name: CKIN
enum_values.description: External clock mapped on the I2S_CKIN pin used as I2S clock source

fields.name: PLLNODIV
fields.description: Do not divide PLL to MCO

enum_values.name: Div2
enum_values.description: PLL is divided by 2 for MCO

enum_values.name: Div1
enum_values.description: PLL is not divided for MCO

enum_values.name: NotInterrupted
enum_values.description: No clock security interrupt caused by HSE clock failure

enum_values.name: Interrupted
enum_values.description: Clock security interrupt caused by HSE clock failure

enum_values.name: Bypassed
enum_values.description: LSE crystal oscillator bypassed with external clock

enum_values.name: LSE
enum_values.description: LSE oscillator clock used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: LSI
enum_values.description: LSI oscillator clock used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: HSE
enum_values.description: HSE oscillator clock divided by a prescaler used as RTC clock

fields.name: V18PWRRSTF
fields.description: Reset flag of the 1.8 V domain

enum_values.name: PCLK
enum_values.description: PCLK selected as USART clock source

enum_values.name: SYSCLK
enum_values.description: SYSCLK selected as USART clock source

enum_values.name: LSE
enum_values.description: LSE selected as USART clock source

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: HSI selected as USART clock source

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: HSI clock selected as I2C clock source

enum_values.name: SYSCLK
enum_values.description: SYSCLK clock selected as I2C clock source

enum_values.name: PLL
enum_values.description: PLL vco output (running up to 144 MHz)
